definition: The art of flailing gracefully to music while pretending it's fun.
The sport of shooting arrows while pretending you are one cloak away from being legendary.
A racket sport where the birdie floats gently until someone smashes it with feelings.
A game of bats, balls, and waiting patiently for someone to sprint dramatically.
A sport where tall people and gravity negotiate loudly over a hoop.
A sport where you throw a heavy ball and blame the shoes when it goes badly.
A friendly way of politely punching someone in the face for competitive fun.
When you decide your arms and legs should swap places just for fun.
A bat-and-ball game known for polite clapping and matches that can last longer than your vacation.
A sport where legs become engines and hills become personal enemies.
In basketball, bouncing the ball without running away with it—like a well-trained dog.
A sport where people poke each other politely while dressed like futuristic beekeepers.
A flying disc that turns lazy afternoons into UFO sightings for dogs.
A sport where people chase tiny balls across enormous lawns with dramatic seriousness.
A sport where people flip through the air while the rest of us fear stairs.
A fast-paced game on ice where friendly brawls can break out at any time.
A martial art where you politely flip someone onto the mat—just for fun.
A martial art that teaches you to punch boards and shout dramatically.
Sledding face-up at insane speeds, because normal sledding was too safe.
A 26.2-mile jog that tests your will, your legs, and your playlist’s endurance.
Basketball’s cousin where dribbling is banned and politeness might actually help.
An international sports fest where five rings mean unity, not marital status.
A horseback game that fuses golf, hockey, and a dash of wild equestrian chaos.
A contact sport where tackling is encouraged, and the ball looks more confused than football.
Sliding down snowy hills while pretending gravity is a recreational partner.
A global sport where feet do the talking and goalkeepers do the panicking.
Standing on a board while the ocean tries to throw you dramatically.
Moving through water without sinking, ideally with more style than panic.
A racket sport where grunting and fancy footwork unite to battle fuzzy yellow orbs.
A game where spiking, diving, and sand in awkward places define your day at the beach.
